issues.description: Action type is 'ReturnToHand' but card text says 'Place at the bottom of the owner's deck' — should be 'PlayFromHand' or a deck-bottom placement action. ReturnToHand returns to hand, not deck bottom.
Missing passive effect for '+1 cost' when you have 2+ Characters with base cost 5+. The DSL only captures the [On Play] effect and omits the permanent cost boost condition.
Missing 'maxCount' parameter — card says 'up to 1', should specify maxCount:1 in the action.
